zh.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellie是John Oliphant和Filla Brothwick的女兒，於1376年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾達爾吉。她於1392年與William Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardine在英國蘇格蘭培爾金加迪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1412年在蘇格蘭培爾布拉可福德享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellie是John Oliphant和Filla Brothwick的女儿，于1376年出生在苏格兰培爾阿爾達爾吉。她于1392年与William Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardine在英国苏格兰培爾金加迪结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1412年在苏格兰培爾布拉可福德享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Oliphant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London) and Scottish (Fife): from Old French olifard or olifant, of uncertain meaning. It has been suggested that this might be a derivative of Old French olif ‘olive’ + the pejorative suffix -ard ‘derisive nickname for one who preferred an olive branch to more martial weapons’; it may have denoted a man twisted like an olive-tree. The variant Olifant may have resulted from the substitution in Old Norman French of the sequence l-r by l-n, leading to a false association with Old French olifant ‘elephant’. This heraldic beast appears in the Scottish family's coats of arms. Branches of the Anglo-Norman family owned lands in both England and Scotland. The surname is now chiefly Scottish.
English: possibly a topographic name from residence at an inn known as the Olyphaunt or ‘elephant’, though whether this gave rise to a hereditary surname is unknown.

nameMeanings.name: Mariota
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellie was born in 1376, in Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland as the daughter of John Oliphant and Filla Brothwick. She married William Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardine in 1392, in Kincardine, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1412, in Blackford, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellie est née en 1376, à Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Écosse, fille de John Oliphant et Filla Brothwick. Elle a épousé William Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardine en 1392, à Kincardine, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1412, à Blackford, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellie wurde 1376 in Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland, als Tochter von John Oliphant und Filla Brothwick geboren. Sie hat 1392 in Kincardine, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom William Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1412 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Blackford, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellie è nata il nel 1376 nel Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland come figlia di John Oliphant e Filla Brothwick. Lei sposato William Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardine nel 1392, nel Kincardine, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1412, nel Blackford, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellieは1376年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーダルジでJohn OliphantとFilla Brothwickの娘として生まれた。1392年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアキンカーディンでWilliam Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1412年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアブラクフォードで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellie(은)는 1376년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압르다기에서 John Oliphant(와)과 Filla Brothwick의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1392년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 킨카딘에서 William Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 블랙퍼드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellie nasceu em 1376, em Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland filha de John Oliphant e Filla Brothwick. Ela casou-se com William Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardine em 1392, em Kincardine, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1412, em Blackford, Perthshire, Scotland, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellie родилась в 1376 г. в местности абирдалги, пиртшир, Шотландия. Её родителей звали John Oliphant и Filla Brothwick. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardine в 1392 г. в местности кинкардаин, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1412 г. в местности блэккфорд, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mariota Oliphant Of Aberdalgir and Kellie nació en 1376, en Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland como hija de John Oliphant y Filla Brothwick. Se casó con William Graham 1st Lord Graham of Kincardine en 1392, en Kincardine, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1412, en Blackford, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 36 años.
